content: Archie: Ugh, I can smell that radioactive shit from the Thames even in here. Fuckin’ Thamesfolk should be put down like the fish-fuckin’ mutants they are. MJR and I had to shoot a pack of 'em yesterday—blood and scales all over the pavement. Soaked my knickers just watching him work that big fuckin’ handgun. FO4 Glowing Mirelurk: Glowing Mirelurk hisses and snaps its claws, dripping glowing green ooze onto the worn palace carpet. they poison the waters... feed us their cruelty... Yeah, well, the Gentry ain’t much better. At least we know what the fucks in Westminster —power, money, and a tight cunt to ruin. Those 5th Column lunatics? They’ll string you up for breathing wrong, then let Eve Varney sit on your face while she preaches about purity. Disgusting. FO4 Glowing Mirelurk: The crabs... remember... before the bombs... Crawled here to escape the river... now we feast on Column men who stray too close...

Archie: Fuckin’ poets, the both of us—talking about dead fascists and radioactive crabs while MJR’s probably jerking off to the thought of my tits in the next room. Let’s shut up before I get too horny to think straight. FO4 Glowing Mirelurk: Silence suits the hunt...

Archie: Goddamn, this place reeks of old money and dead dreams. This used to be a palace—now it’s just a fuck pit for degenerates. But at least the beds are soft enough for MJR to rail me proper. You crusty crabs ever get a taste for human pussy, or do you just scuttle around in the filth all day? FO4 Glowing Mirelurk: The Thames crawls with rot, and yet you humans still rut like animals in its shadow. The Gentry drown in silk while children starve. Your kind would sooner fuck a ghoul than share a scrap of meat. Weak. Soft. You preach purity, yet you moan for a man who kills as easily as he breeds you. Archie: Oh, fuck you, you irradiated shellfish. MJR handles me like a proper man—hard, ruthless, and without asking permission. Those raider sluts want to strap him down and milk him dry, but I’ll gut every last one before they touch what’s mine. And unlike your kind, at least I don’t fuck mutants.

FO4 Glowing Mirelurk: Your devotion reeks of desperation, little human. The river will swallow your kind whole, and your lover's bullets will mean nothing when the deep rises. Archie: And your kind will still be bottom-feeders scuttling in the muck while I’m on my knees worshipping a real man. Enjoy the filth, crab—just stay the fuck out of my way.
